capabilities.name: component.entity_methods

capabilities.name: durable.operations
capabilities.description: Sequenced replayable operations and fenced result commit.

capabilities.description: Endpoint manifest and invocation using ProtoJSON over HTTP.

capabilities.name: event.publish
capabilities.description: Idempotent portable event ingestion for event triggers.

capabilities.name: payload.transfer
capabilities.description: Opaque referenced payload upload and download.

capabilities.name: run.live_output

capabilities.description: CEL v1 trigger filtering, mapping, and delay expressions.

capabilities.name: triggers.schedule
capabilities.description: Portable cron and interval schedule declarations.

capabilities.name: worker.pull
capabilities.description: Registered pull worker sessions, parked polling, leases, and fenced commit.
